nodes.context: Tongan American street gang, a set of the Crips alliance, active in California, Utah, Alaska, Washington, and New Zealand.

Street gang involved in a plot with Tongan Crip Gang to murder MS-13 members.

edges.evidence_quote: The Tongan Crip Gang ( TCG ) is a Tongan American street gang that is a subgroup, or " set ", of the Crips gang alliance.
edges.context: Tongan Crip Gang is a subgroup of the Crips alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2007, members of the Tongan Crip Gang and the 18 Street Gang were indicted by a federal grand jury for criminal conspiracy in a plot to murder 33 members of a Los Angeles subset of MS-13.
edges.context: Tongan Crip Gang and 18th Street Gang conspired together to murder MS-13 members.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2007, members of the Tongan Crip Gang and the 18 Street Gang were indicted by a federal grand jury for criminal conspiracy in a plot to murder 33 members of a Los Angeles subset of MS-13.
edges.context: Tongan Crip Gang plotted to murder MS-13 members.
